Community benefit report scope: §501(c)(3) hospitals only — emitter dormant

lines.text: Net patient service revenue disaggregated by payor class per ASC 606 606-10-50-5: Medicare Traditional: gross $28,000,000,000, contractual adjustments $12,000,000,000, implicit price concessions $2,000,000,000, net $14,000,000,000; Medicare Advantage: gross $18,000,000,000, contractual adjustments $7,000,000,000, implicit price concessions $1,000,000,000, net $10,000,000,000; Medicaid: gross $12,000,000,000, contractual adjustments $5,000,000,000, implicit price concessions $500,000,000, net $6,500,000,000; Managed Care: gross $15,000,000,000, contractual adjustments $6,000,000,000, implicit price concessions $800,000,000, net $8,200,000,000; Self-Pay: gross $6,000,000,000, contractual adjustments $1,500,000,000, implicit price concessions $500,000,000, net $4,000,000,000; Other: gross $4,000,000,000, contractual adjustments $1,500,000,000, implicit price concessions $300,000,000, net $2,200,000,000. Total net patient service revenue $44,900,000,000.

Residual allowance for doubtful accounts (post-ASC 606 CECL): opening $200,000,000, additions charged to provision for doubtful accounts $320,000,000, write-offs $280,000,000, recoveries $15,000,000, closing $255,000,000 per ASC 326 326-20-50-4, 606 residual collectibility. Residual collectibility expense 0.71% of net patient service revenue.
